mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_name AS "patientName", risk_level AS "riskLevel", create_time AS "createTime" FROM triage_desk_record WHERE status = 0 AND LOWER(COALESCE(risk_level, '')) IN ('high', 'critical', 'urgent', 'medium') AND create_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM triage_desk_record WHERE status = 0

SELECT d.id AS "departmentId", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", COUNT(*) AS "waitingCount" FROM register r JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id WHERE DATE(r.visit_date) = CURRENT_DATE AND r.check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND r.call_status IN (0, 3) GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT d.id, d.name, COALESCE(d.stock_quantity, 0) AS "stockQuantity", COALESCE(d.low_stock_threshold, 10) AS "lowStockThreshold" FROM drug_info d WHERE COALESCE(d.status, 1) = 1 AND COALESCE(d.stock_quantity, 0) < COALESCE(d.low_stock_threshold, 10) ORDER BY d.stock_quantity ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT #{limit}
